title: MikroTik power supply 48POW, 48V 1.46A 70W, power plug (EU)
description: Original MikroTik power adapter 48POW with EU plug for plugging into a socket, with a standard 5.5 / 2.1mm connector intended for powering, for example, MikroTik devices with input voltage 48V DC . The power adapter has a maximum power of 70W with a maximum output current of 1.6A GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
